sentence: Manhana nun bai a nebar, mas hoije stá friu.
ipa: mɐˈɲanɐ ˈnũ ˈbaj ˈɐ nɨˈβaɾ ˈmas̺ ˈojʒɨ ˈs̺ta ˈfɾju
gloss_en: Tomorrow it's not going to snow, but today it's cold.
notes: Northern/Raiano tracks Central Mirandese: unstressed reduction and /b/-spirantisation nebar->[nɨˈβaɾ] (mateus_dandrade2000).

sentence: Un litro de bino custa dous euros.
ipa: ˈũ ˈʎitɾu ˈdɨ ˈbinu ˈkus̺tɐ ˈdows̺ ˈewɾus̺
gloss_en: A litre of wine costs two euros.
notes: The ⟨ou⟩ diphthong is retained in dous->[ˈdows̺]; Raiano everyday lexicon (convencao1999).

sentence: Tengo que ir a la feira l martes.
ipa: ˈteŋɡu ˈkɨ ˈiɾ ˈɐ ˈʎɐ ˈfejɾɐ ˈʎ ˈmaɾtɨs̺
gloss_en: I have to go to the market on Tuesday.
notes: Market lexicon; ⟨ei⟩ in feira->[ˈfejɾɐ] (convencao1999).

sentence: L miu abó bibe nua aldé pequeinha.
ipa: ˈʎ ˈmju ɐˈβɔ ˈbiβɨ ˈnwa ɐˈldɛ pɨˈkejɲɐ
gloss_en: My grandfather lives in a small village.
notes: Northern/Raiano register abó, aldé; palatal ⟨nh⟩->[ɲ] in pequeinha (vasconcelos1900).

sentence: Sobe la cuosta i bira a la squierda.
ipa: ˈs̺oβɨ ˈʎɐ ˈkwos̺tɐ ˈi ˈbiɾɐ ˈɐ ˈʎɐ ˈs̺kjɛɾdɐ
gloss_en: Go up the slope and turn to the left.
notes: Preserved Leonese ⟨uo⟩->[wo] in cuosta and ⟨ie⟩ in squierda (vasconcelos1900).

sentence: Esta chicha de canhona stá saborosa.
ipa: ˈes̺tɐ ˈtʃitʃɐ ˈdɨ kɐˈɲonɐ ˈs̺ta s̺ɐβuˈɾoz̺ɐ
gloss_en: This sheep meat is tasty.
notes: Pastoral lexicon chicha, canhona characteristic of the border herding economy (convencao1999).

sentence: Adonde queda l termo de la aldé?
ipa: ɐˈdondɨ ˈkedɐ ˈʎ ˈteɾmu ˈdɨ ˈʎɐ ɐˈldɛ
gloss_en: Where does the boundary of the village lie?
notes: Raiano boundary lexicon termo, aldé documented for the northern speech (vasconcelos1900).

sentence: Quantas canhonas hai ne l rebanho?
ipa: ˈkɐ̃tɐs̺ kɐˈɲonɐs̺ ˈaj ˈnɨ ˈʎ rɨˈβaɲu
gloss_en: How many sheep are there in the flock?
notes: Trill /r/ in rebanho->[rɨˈβaɲu]; flock-herding register (vasconcelos1900).

sentence: Se fur possible, bou a la fiesta.
ipa: ˈs̺ɨ ˈfuɾ puˈs̺iblɨ ˈbow ˈɐ ˈʎɐ ˈfjɛs̺tɐ
gloss_en: If it's possible, I'll go to the festival.
notes: Leonese ⟨ie⟩->[jɛ] in fiesta->[ˈfjɛs̺tɐ] (vasconcelos1900).

sentence: Onte bendi las mies canhonas na feira.
ipa: ˈõtɨ ˈbendi ˈʎas̺ ˈmjɛs̺ kɐˈɲonɐs̺ ˈnɐ ˈfejɾɐ
gloss_en: Yesterday I sold my sheep at the market.
notes: Sheep-economy register bendi, canhonas; ⟨ei⟩ in feira (vasconcelos1900).

sentence: Para la simana que ben serei an Miranda.
ipa: ˈpaɾɐ ˈʎɐ s̺iˈmanɐ ˈkɨ ˈbẽ ˈs̺eɾej ˈɐ̃ miˈɾandɐ
gloss_en: Next week I'll be in Miranda.
notes: The ⟨ei⟩ diphthong in serei and nasal ⟨an⟩->[ɐ̃] (convencao1999).

sentence: L miu bezino telefonou-me anuite.
ipa: ˈʎ ˈmju bɨˈzinu tɨlɨˈfonow ˈmɨ ɐˈnujtɨ
gloss_en: My neighbour phoned me last night.
notes: Unstressed reduction in bezino->[bɨˈzinu]; night lexicon anuite (mateus_dandrade2000).

sentence: Buonas tardes, cumo stás? Stou bien, grácias.
ipa: ˈbwonɐs̺ ˈtaɾdɨs̺ ˈkumu ˈs̺tas̺ ˈs̺tow ˈbjɛ ˈɡɾasjas̺
gloss_en: Good afternoon, how are you? I'm well, thanks.
notes: Greeting formulae; ⟨ou⟩ retained in stou->[ˈs̺tow] (convencao1999).

sentence: Quien madruga, Dius l ajuda.
ipa: ˈkjɛ mɐˈdɾuɣɐ ˈdjus̺ ˈʎ ɐˈʒudɐ
gloss_en: He who rises early, God helps.
notes: Proverb register; the everyday form Dius for God (convencao1999).

sentence: L riu cuôrre depriessa pul termo abaixo.
ipa: ˈʎ ˈrju ˈkwɔrɨ dɨˈpɾjɛs̺ɐ ˈpul ˈteɾmu ɐˈβajʃu
gloss_en: The river runs quickly down the district.
notes: Trill /r/ in riu->[ˈrju]; ⟨uô⟩ in cuôrre and ⟨ie⟩ in depriessa (vasconcelos1900).

sentence: Bi ua ourbalheira ne l prado a la manhana.
ipa: ˈbi ˈwa owɾbɐˈʎejɾɐ ˈnɨ ˈʎ ˈpɾadu ˈɐ ˈʎɐ mɐˈɲanɐ
gloss_en: I saw dew on the meadow in the morning.
notes: The ⟨ou⟩ diphthong in ourbalheira->[owɾbɐˈʎejɾɐ] with palatal ⟨lh⟩->[ʎ] (vasconcelos1900).

sentence: L pastor guarda l mel ne l curral.
ipa: ˈʎ pɐˈs̺toɾ ˈɡwaɾdɐ ˈʎ ˈmel ˈnɨ ˈʎ kuˈral
gloss_en: The shepherd keeps the honey in the corral.
notes: Trill /r/ in curral->[kuˈral]; shepherd register with coda ⟨l⟩ (vasconcelos1900).

sentence: La bielha filha la lhana cun carino.
ipa: ˈʎɐ ˈbjɛʎɐ ˈfiʎɐ ˈʎɐ ˈʎanɐ ˈkũ kɐˈɾinu
gloss_en: The old woman spins the wool with care.
notes: Palatal lateral ⟨lh⟩->[ʎ] in filha, lhana; ⟨ie⟩ in bielha (vasconcelos1900).

sentence: La puôrta de l celeiro stá cerrada.
ipa: ˈʎɐ ˈpwɔɾtɐ ˈdɨ ˈʎ sɨˈlejɾu ˈs̺ta sɨˈradɐ
gloss_en: The door of the granary is closed.
notes: Preserved ⟨uô⟩->[wɔ] in puôrta and ⟨ei⟩ in celeiro (vasconcelos1900).

sentence: An Márcio l campo inda stá branco.
ipa: ˈɐ̃ ˈmaɾsjo ˈʎ ˈkɐ̃pu ˈindɐ ˈs̺ta ˈbɾɐ̃ku
gloss_en: In March the field is still white.
notes: Nasal ⟨an⟩->[ɐ̃] in Márcio, an, campo, branco; unstressed reduction (mateus_dandrade2000).
